backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining an esports backend with in-memory maps for announcements and roster members, exposing CRUD query/update methods for both collections.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the team brand name was updated across Footer, HeroSection, and Navbar to display 'Legend', 'X', and 'Arena' as three distinct styled elements.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components, hooks, styles, and configuration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file that defines OKLCH-based CSS custom property tokens for both light and dark themes, including colors for background, foreground, primary, sidebar, and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with PWA meta tags, manifest link, service worker registration script, and favicon/apple-touch-icon references pointing to a JPEG asset.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest for 'Legend X Esports' defining app name, theme color, standalone display mode, and icon references using a JPEG asset.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing a cache-first with background-refresh strategy for GET requests, with offline fallback to index.html for navigation requests and automatic old-cache cleanup on activation.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes PWAInstallBanner, Navbar, LandingPage, and AdminPanel into the full application layout.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component displaying team mission text, a clipped profile image panel, and a four-card values grid (Discipline, Excellence, Victory, Brotherhood).
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Floating admin panel widget with tabbed UI for managing roster members and announcements, wiring form state to React Query mutation hooks for add, edit, and delete operations.
frontend/src/components/AnnouncementCard: Renders a styled card for a single announcement, displaying its title, body, and formatted nanosecond timestamp with hover effects and decorative accents.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with the Legend X Arena brand, navigation quick links, social media icons (YouTube, Instagram, Facebook), and contact info.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Renders the hero section featuring an animated canvas shooting animation that draws an arm, gun, bullets, casings, and muzzle flash using requestAnimationFrame.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Renders a fixed top navigation bar with the Legend X Arena brand logo, desktop nav links, a CTA button, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/NewsSection.tsx: Renders the News & Announcements section, fetching data via useAnnouncements hook and displaying loading skeletons, error, empty, or a grid of AnnouncementCard components.
frontend/src/components/PlayerCard.tsx: Renders a styled player card showing an avatar image, role badge, and player name with hover effects and a fallback default avatar image.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallBanner: Displays a dismissible top banner prompting users to install the app as a PWA, handling the beforeinstallprompt event and providing iOS fallback instructions in Urdu.
frontend/src/components/RosterSection.ts: Renders the roster/team section of the landing page, fetching player data via `useRoster` hook and displaying loading skeletons, error, empty, or populated grid of `PlayerCard` components.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor/identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via `AuthClient`.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating announcements and roster members against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base/utility layers, CSS custom properties for the dark esports color theme, and utility classes for glows, gradients, and typography.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider`.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Composes the full landing page by rendering Hero, About, Roster, News, and Footer sections in order.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom esports color tokens, fonts, shadows, border radii, keyframe animations, and enabling typography/container-queries/animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state at version 5, recording existing features and two pending action requests: reverting the frontend to Version 44 and updating brand name text labels.
